allow: Bash(.specify/scripts/bash/create-new-feature.sh --json --number 3 --short-name "script-eval-visualizer" "Build a caryatid module under modules folder that listens to utxo_state's phase 2 validation events on cardano.utxo.phase2 channel, with a real-time React frontend showing the latest 1000 script evaluations via SSE. The publishing of scripts evaluation results in utxo_state can be turned on/off.")
